mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lesson_summary (lesson_id, course_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, title, summary_status, summary_brief, summary_content, homework, ready_at) VALUES (#{lessonId}, #{courseId}, #{teacherUid}, #{studentUid}, #{title}, #{summaryStatus}, #{summaryBrief}, #{summaryContent}, #{homework}, #{readyAt})

INSERT INTO lesson_summary (lesson_id, course_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, title, summary_status, summary_brief, summary_content, homework, ready_at) VALUES (#{lessonId}, #{courseId}, #{teacherUid}, #{studentUid}, #{title}, 'READY', #{summaryBrief}, #{summaryContent}, #{homework}, #{readyAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE course_id = VALUES(course_id), teacher_uid = VALUES(teacher_uid), student_uid = VALUES(student_uid), title = VALUES(title), summary_status = 'READY', summary_brief = VALUES(summary_brief), summary_content = VALUES(summary_content), homework = VALUES(homework), ready_at = VALUES(ready_at), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lesson_summary WHERE lesson_id = #{lessonId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM lesson_summary WHERE summary_status = 'READY' AND ready_at >= #{since} AND (teacher_uid = #{userId} OR student_uid = #{userId}) ORDER BY ready_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
